title: Onader Steak Knives Set of 4, Stainless Steel Serrated Kitchen Knives with Ergonomic Handle, Sharp Dinner Table Knives for Home Restaurant, Full Tang & Mirror Finished & Dishwasher Safe
features: 【Premium Stainless Steel】 The steak knives set is made of food grade 18/0 stainless steel, Without harmful substances and non-nickel, Healthy and rust proof for daily dining use, Sturdy enough and won’t easy to bend or deform, Designed to last for long service term

【Finely Serrated Blade】 Our kitchen knives feature sharp micro-serrated edge, Makes you more effective in the process of slicing/ cutting through steak, lamb chop, chicken, fish, chicken, bread, pizza, fruit, or any food during your dinner, No need for any sharpening for convenient use

【Well Made】 Streamlined shape handle ergonomically-designed for comfortable grip and use, with smooth edge design won’t hurt your hands, Nice weight, proper size and medium thickness makes you feel balanced in hands, Robust full tang construction for easy control and use

【Easy Clean】 Smooth polished surface always remain glossy and bright even after multiply use, Sleek surface can remove the residue easily even by hand washing, Just rinse them with warm soapy water to make cleaning a breeze, Dishwasher safe to save your time and labor with less hassle

【Elegant & Versatile】 The 4-piece set of steak knives, Simple but classy shaped design never out of style, Unlike the traditional steak knives, This table knives set can easily go well with your existing cutlery or tableware, Suitable for family gathering, wedding, birthday, party, BBQ, camping, Or used for restaurants, hotels and more
description: Product Description Nice weight, proper size and medium thickness makes you feel balanced in hands Made out of food grade stainless steel, non-toxic and anti-rust for healthy dinner use.
